item.title: METU-NCC courses
item.description:
1. Introduction to Fluid Mechanics, Must course, Spring semesters since 2016.

  2. Drilling Engineering I, Must course, Fall semesters since 2016.

  3. Drilling Engineering II, Must course, Spring 2017.

  4. Petroleum Engineering Project Design I, Must course, Fall semesters since 2016.

  5. Enhanced Oil Recovery, Elective course, Spring semesters since 2016.

  6. Mathematical Modeling of Hydrocarbon Reservoirs, Elective course, Fall semesters since 2016.

  7. Special Topics: Surface Operations, Elective course, Spring semesters since 2018.

I developed this course as a new technical elective for the program. Course covers thermal-hydraulic calculations for single phase (liquid or gas) and two-phase flow (homogeneous model and Beggs & Brill correlation) in surface pipes, solution of pipe networks, phase equilibrium of hydrocarbon mixtures at the separator; and design of separator dimensions for physical separation.
